signals.headline: South Korea's January 2026 CPI hits BOK's 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's January 2026 CPI hits BOK's 2.0% annual target at five-month low | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Consumer inflation in South Korea eased to 2.0% year-on-year in January 2026, down from 2.3% in December and matching the Bank of Korea's target for the first time since August 2025, as reported by official data released Tuesday.[1][2]
